title: LLM-based and Retrieval-Augmented Control Code Generation | Proceedings of the 1st International Workshop on Large Language Models for Code
summary: This paper proposes a retrieval-augmented generation method that enables large language models to synthesize industrial control code (IEC 61131-3 Structured Text) while integrating proprietary function block libraries. The approach addresses the limitation of LLMs being unaware of such libraries, allowing reuse of well-tested blocks and speeding up engineering tasks. A prototypical implementation uses GPT-4, LangChain, OpenPLC, and the OSCAT library. In spot tests, the method successfully generated compilable and simulation-validated ST code.
author: Heiko Koziolek
